description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof that serves as a large rooftop terrace. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick, and the windows are symmetrically arranged, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The rooftop area is divided into green lawn sections and paved zones, with outdoor furniture such as benches, tables, and umbrellas, suggesting recreational use. The perimeter of the roof is enclosed by a white railing, enhancing safety and visual appeal. The main entrance is accessible via a straight walkway flanked by small lights, and the entryway is marked by double doors. The overall design is modern with functional outdoor spaces and a focus on communal rooftop amenities.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof terrace, light brick exterior, and symmetrical windows. The rooftop features green lawns, paved areas, and outdoor furniture enclosed by white railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a rooftop terrace with benches and tables.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the expansive rooftop lawn, paved terrace, and outdoor umbrellas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the rooftop terrace, multiple lounge chairs, and umbrellas along the railing.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the green rooftop lawn, benches, and the entry walkway leading to the main door.
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a straight walkway, flanked by small lights, no porch or overhang
